rules.rule_text:
private rule MirageStrings : Mirage Family
{
	meta:
		description = "Mirage Identifying Strings"
		author = "Seth Hardy"
		last_modified = "2014-06-25"

	strings:
		$ = "Neo,welcome to the desert of real." wide ascii
		$ = "/result?hl=en&id=%s"

	condition:
		any of them
}

rule Mirage : Family
{
	meta:
		description = "Mirage"
		author = "Seth Hardy"
		last_modified = "2014-06-25"

	condition:
		MirageStrings
}
